developments.t_zh: 出口管制解除后 Fable 5 于7月1日起全球重新上线，Pro/Max/Team 计划至7月7日可用至周限额50%，其后转用量额度
developments.t_en: Fable 5 redeployed globally from July 1 after export controls lifted; included up to 50% of weekly limits on paid plans through July 7, then via usage credits

developments.t_zh: 宣布 Claude Cowork 上云：多设备可用、设备离线也能跑任务，并将 Chat 与 Cowork 统一到同一空间
developments.t_en: Announced Claude Cowork is moving to the cloud — accessible from multiple devices, running tasks even when devices are offline, with chat and Cowork unified

developments.t_zh: 推出 Reflect 使用仪表盘（beta）：追踪 AI 使用习惯、月度回顾与专注设置
developments.t_en: Launched Reflect, a beta dashboard tracking Claude usage habits with monthly recaps and focus settings

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 闭源前沿全面复线，产品面转向分发与使用层；但北京同期酝酿对中国前沿模型的出口限制，开闭源代差正被两国政策共同定价
modelWatch.gap_note_en: Closed frontier fully back online with product focus shifting to distribution; with Beijing now weighing its own export curbs, the open/closed gap is being priced by two governments at once

developments.t_zh: GPT-5.6 三型号（Sol/Terra/Luna）7月9日面向公众发布，经商务部 CAISI 附加测试后放行
developments.t_en: GPT-5.6 family (Sol/Terra/Luna) publicly released July 9 after additional Commerce/CAISI testing cleared wider rollout

developments.t_zh: 同步推出 ChatGPT Work；官方称 Sol 编码任务 token 效率提升54%，为其「最强网络安全模型」
developments.t_en: ChatGPT Work launched alongside; company claims Sol is 54% more token-efficient on coding and its strongest cybersecurity model yet

developments.t_zh: 7月8日发布 GPT-Live 全双工语音模型，边听边说
developments.t_en: Launched GPT-Live on July 8, full-duplex voice models that listen and speak simultaneously

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: GPT-5.6 走「政府附加测试后放行」流程，闭源迭代节奏已被政策中介化；Work/企业分发与效率叙事指向商业化变现加速
modelWatch.gap_note_en: GPT-5.6 shipped via a government-testing gate — closed cadence is policy-mediated; the Work launch and token-efficiency pitch point at accelerating enterprise monetization

developments.t_zh: 7月2日发布 GLM-5.2 配套 harness「ZCode」，新用户送500万 token、订阅配额+50%，直接对标 Anthropic 工具链
developments.t_en: Released ZCode on July 2, an agent harness for GLM-5.2 with 5M free tokens for new users and 50% bigger quotas, aimed squarely at Anthropic's tooling

developments.t_zh: GLM 需求激增+美国出口管制挤压算力，智谱据报正评估自研 AI 芯片
developments.t_en: With GLM demand surging and US export controls squeezing compute, Zhipu is reportedly weighing designing its own AI chip

developments.t_zh: 创始人唐杰内部信主张前沿 AI 应向所有人开放：真正的安全来自广泛参与、共享与监督
developments.t_en: Founder Tang Jie argued in a staff memo that frontier AI should stay open to all — genuine security comes from broad participation, sharing and oversight

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: 开源线的「便宜且够用」论证正面临自己的政策闸门：北京与阿里/字节/智谱磋商限制前沿模型出境，创始人公开信像是对内的反向游说
modelWatch.gap_note_en: The cheap-and-good-enough open-weight argument now faces its own policy gate: Beijing is consulting Alibaba/ByteDance/Z.ai on curbing overseas access, and the founder's open letter reads like counter-lobbying from inside

modelWatch.current_line: Qwen3.7 (Max flagship / Plus multimodal, proprietary API)

developments.t_zh: 7月8日 BABA 单日+11%（十个月最佳）：云智能收入+38%、外部云+40%、AI 云产品收入89.7亿元、云 EBITA+57%
developments.t_en: BABA jumped 11% on July 8, its best day in ten months: Cloud Intelligence revenue +38%, external cloud +40%, AI cloud product revenue RMB8.97B, cloud EBITA +57%

developments.t_zh: 商务部过去一月约谈阿里/字节/智谱，酝酿限制海外访问最先进模型（含 Qwen 及未发布版本），尚无定论
developments.t_en: China's Commerce Ministry held month-long talks with Alibaba, ByteDance and Z.ai on restricting foreign access to their most advanced models including Qwen; nothing decided yet

modelWatch.gap_note_zh: API 独占→云所有者集中价值的假设再获验证（+38% 云收入直接引爆股价）；但若出境限制落地，Qwen 国际 API 业务反成政策人质
modelWatch.gap_note_en: API-exclusivity-concentrates-value got another confirmation — the 38% cloud print detonated the stock; but if overseas-access curbs land, Qwen's international API business becomes the policy hostage

equities.correlation_note_zh: 美光成为 Anthropic 先进 AI 系统首选内存/存储供应商并共研 HBM，绑定深化
博通六大定制芯片客户含 Anthropic，其推理算力自研化直接受益博通
AWS 为 Anthropic 主要云与算力伙伴，Claude 迭代传导至其 capex 与云收入
谷歌为 Anthropic 股东兼云供应商，TPU 算力承接其训练需求
GPT-5.6 成为 M365 Copilot 首选模型并推出 ChatGPT Work，OpenAI 迭代最直接传导微软产品线
与 OpenAI 共研 Jalapeño 推理芯片，年底起部署整机架，定制 ASIC 主线
OpenAI 训练/推理算力主力供应商；其自研芯片进展亦构成边际分流风险
腾讯为智谱投资方，开源强发布利好其云与应用生态承接低成本模型
寒武纪：国产开源模型普及+智谱评估自研芯片，均指向本土推理算力需求扩张
科大讯飞：垂直闭源路线受开源边际成本下降挤压
Qwen3.7 API 独占直接沉淀为阿里云收入，7月8日+38%云收入引爆股价已验证
百度文心与 Qwen 在企业 API 市场正面竞争，Qwen 强势构成压力

weeklyTake.zh: 本周主线是「政策对称化」：华盛顿经 CAISI 附加测试放行 GPT-5.6 公发、Fable 5 全球复线的同时，北京与阿里/字节/智谱磋商限制最先进模型（含开源权重）出境——开闭源代差首次同时被两国政府定价。资本市场端：阿里云+38%单日引爆 BABA +11%，验证 API 独占→云所有者集中价值；SK 海力士登陆纳斯达克首日+13%把内存主线搬进美股，但周五 MU/SNDK 大幅回吐提醒高位波动。
weeklyTake.en: This week's theme is policy symmetry: as Washington cleared GPT-5.6's public launch through CAISI testing and Fable 5 redeployed globally, Beijing consulted Alibaba, ByteDance and Z.ai on restricting overseas access to frontier models including open weights — the open/closed gap is now priced by both governments. In markets, Alibaba's 38% cloud print detonated an 11% single-day move, confirming the API-exclusivity channel; SK Hynix's +13% Nasdaq debut brought the memory trade onshore, though Friday's sharp MU/SNDK giveback flags elevated volatility.

tracks.state_zh: HBM 供给持续紧张（HBM3E 交期20-26周）；SKHY 纳斯达克首日+13%收168.01美元；板块周内先跌入技术熊市又反弹再回吐，波动加剧
tracks.state_en: HBM supply still tight (HBM3E lead times 20-26 weeks); SKHY debuted +13% at $168.01; the group whipsawed through a bear-market dip, rebound and Friday giveback

tracks.state_zh: CXL 池化仍处商业化早期，本周无新增专线证据；互连层整体（CXL/NVLink Fusion/UALink）随 AI 集群扩张的判断维持
tracks.state_en: CXL pooling still early-commercial with no new track-specific evidence this week; the interconnect-scales-with-clusters view carries forward

tracks.state_zh: NAND 合约价预计3Q26环比再涨10-15%，月度内存销售额创746亿美元纪录；但消费端承受力见顶，SNDK 周五-7%显示高估值对供给反转恐惧极敏感
tracks.state_en: NAND contract prices projected +10-15% QoQ into 3Q26 and monthly memory sales hit a record $74.6B; but consumer affordability is capping the surge and SNDK's -7% Friday shows the fear-sensitivity of rich valuations

cards.moat_zh: 美国唯一 HBM 本土产能+政策红利；HBM 售罄至2027，16份不可撤销合同锁定超220亿美元 HBM 收入
cards.thesis_zh: FQ3 爆表后周四见顶约1214美元，周五-7%至约1130美元回吐（近月+35%）；获利了结而非论点破坏，Anthropic 首选内存伙伴关系与 T1 定价权、T3 数据中心 NAND 双轮未变
cards.key_risk_zh: HBM4 竞争中份额仍居第三；估值已计入超级周期，板块对供给反转恐惧高度敏感
cards.moat_en: Only US-based HBM maker with policy tailwind; HBM sold out through 2027 with $22B+ in non-cancelable contracts
cards.thesis_en: Peaked near $1,214 Thursday after the blowout FQ3, then gave back 7% to ~$1,130 Friday (+35% on the month) — profit-taking, not thesis damage; the Anthropic first-choice memory partnership and T1 pricing power plus T3 datacenter NAND both stand
cards.key_risk_en: Still #3 in HBM4 share; supercycle priced in and the group is acutely sensitive to oversupply fear

cards.moat_zh: HBM 市占约50-55%居首，为 NVIDIA HBM4 供应约三分之二；265亿美元创纪录 ADR 发行获逾7倍超额认购
cards.thesis_zh: 7月10日首日+13%收168.01美元（发行价149），验证美股对内存主线的承接力；募资投向新厂与设备，董事长称「需求巨大」；T1 定价权最纯粹的美股载体
cards.key_risk_zh: HBM4 量产节奏推迟至3Q26，三星在 HBM4/4E 上抢跑；新股波动与解禁压力
cards.moat_en: HBM leader at ~50-55% share supplying roughly two-thirds of NVIDIA's HBM4; the record $26.5B ADR offering was 7x+ oversubscribed
cards.thesis_en: Debuted +13% July 10, closing $168.01 vs the $149 pricing — proof of US appetite for the memory trade; proceeds fund new fabs and equipment with the chairman calling demand 'enormous'; the purest US-tradable T1 vehicle
cards.key_risk_en: HBM4 volume ramp slipped to 3Q26 while Samsung accelerates; new-listing volatility and lockup overhang

catalysts.what: Ticker switches from interim SKHYV to SKHY for regular-way Nasdaq trading

cards.moat_zh: 内存+代工+终端垂直一体，HBM 市占约35-40%；HBM4 销售额据报已破10亿美元，5月底率先向 NVIDIA 交付 HBM4E 样品
cards.thesis_zh: HBM4 世代三星节奏反超（全年出货量预期上调），若持续将改写 T1 双寡头格局；NAND 端同样受益 KV-cache 需求
cards.key_risk_zh: OTC ADR 流动性极差，美股敞口工具性弱；HBM 良率与客户认证仍是执行风险
cards.moat_en: Vertically integrated memory+foundry+devices; ~35-40% HBM share, HBM4 sales reportedly topped $1B and first HBM4E samples shipped to NVIDIA in late May
cards.thesis_en: Samsung is out-executing on the HBM4 generation with full-year volume estimates revised up — if sustained, it reshapes the T1 duopoly; NAND side also rides KV-cache demand
cards.key_risk_en: Very thin OTC ADR liquidity limits US-market expression; HBM yield and customer qualification remain execution risks

catalysts.what: HBM4E qualification and volume decisions at NVIDIA

cards.moat_zh: 智能互连平台横跨 CXL/PCIe/Ethernet/NVLink Fusion/UALink + COSMOS 软件栈，AI 集群扩张的连接层收税人
cards.thesis_zh: 收入同比+93%创纪录，7月初随板块反弹大涨；CXL 池化商业化的最直接上市标的，且不押注单一协议
cards.key_risk_zh: 估值极高；互连协议路线之争（NVLink 私有生态 vs 开放 CXL/UALink）可能重排份额
cards.moat_en: Intelligent connectivity platform spanning CXL, PCIe, Ethernet, NVLink Fusion and UALink plus the COSMOS software suite — a toll-taker on AI cluster scale-out
cards.thesis_en: Record results at +93% YoY revenue and a sharp early-July rebound; the most direct listed play on CXL pooling without single-protocol risk
cards.key_risk_en: Rich valuation; protocol wars (proprietary NVLink vs open CXL/UALink) could reshuffle share

cards.moat_zh: 定制 AI 硅+互连双线：获 NVIDIA 20亿美元投资并纳入 NVLink 生态，数据中心占收入76%
cards.thesis_zh: 50+定制 AI 设计机会、FY29 定制芯片收入目标超100亿美元；3nm XPU 今年量产，内存墙时代互连与近内存定制逻辑的关键卖铲人
cards.key_risk_zh: 7月初涨后显疲态；定制芯片项目集中度高，单客户流失冲击大
cards.moat_en: Dual custom-silicon + interconnect franchise: $2B NVIDIA investment with NVLink-ecosystem integration; datacenter now 76% of revenue
cards.thesis_en: 50+ custom AI design opportunities and $10B custom revenue targeted by FY29, lead 3nm XPU entering production this year — a key arms dealer for interconnect and near-memory custom logic
cards.key_risk_en: Post-rally exhaustion; custom-silicon concentration means single-customer losses hit hard

cards.moat_zh: 已更名 Everpure（2026-02-23 生效，NYSE 代码 PSTG 不变）：全闪存平台转向企业 AI 数据管理，并购 1touch，单季营收首破10亿美元
cards.thesis_zh: KV-cache 下沉与推理数据分层利好高性能全闪存阵列；更名标志从存储商转向 AI 数据基础设施定位
cards.key_risk_zh: 超大规模客户自建存储侵蚀高端需求；转型叙事需要收入结构证实
cards.moat_en: Renamed Everpure effective Feb 23, 2026 (NYSE ticker PSTG unchanged): all-flash platform pivoting to enterprise AI data management, 1touch acquisition, first $1B quarter
cards.thesis_en: KV-cache offload and inference data tiering favor high-performance all-flash arrays; the rebrand marks a strategic shift from storage vendor to AI data infrastructure
cards.key_risk_en: Hyperscaler in-house storage erodes the high end; the pivot narrative still needs revenue-mix proof

cards.moat_zh: NAND 纯度最高标的之一：营收同比+251%至60亿美元，毛利率78.4%；5份长约覆盖 FY27 约1/3产能，Stargate QLC SSD 商用
cards.thesis_zh: 周五-7%至约2176美元（近月仍+47%）：合约价3Q26预计再涨10-15%的基本面与获利了结的股价背离；KV-cache 使数据中心2026年成 NAND 第一大终端的论点未变
cards.key_risk_zh: 消费端承受力见顶或使涨价周期提前降温；高毛利在新产能投放下的持续性存疑
cards.moat_en: One of the purest NAND plays: revenue +251% YoY to $6.0B at 78.4% gross margin; five LTAs covering ~1/3 of FY27 bits, Stargate QLC SSDs shipping
cards.thesis_en: Fell 7% Friday to ~$2,176 (still +47% on the month) — price action diverging from fundamentals as NAND contract prices are projected up another 10-15% QoQ in 3Q26; the KV-cache-makes-datacenter-NAND's-#1-market thesis stands
cards.key_risk_en: Consumer affordability hitting its ceiling could cool the pricing cycle early; record margins under new capacity remain in question

cards.moat_zh: 定制 ASIC + 交换/互连双垄断位：六大定制芯片客户（含 OpenAI/Anthropic/Meta/谷歌），下季 AI 收入指引约160亿美元（同比+200%+）
cards.thesis_zh: 上周双催化：与苹果续约至2031、与 OpenAI 共研推理芯片 Jalapeño 年底上架；内存池化所需的 PCIe/CXL 交换与光互连是其腹地
cards.key_risk_zh: AI 收入集中于少数超大客户；客户自研芯片能力内化是长期反噬风险
cards.moat_en: Dual lock on custom ASICs and switching/interconnect: six custom-chip customers including OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta and Google; ~$16B next-quarter AI revenue guide (+200% YoY)
cards.thesis_en: Last week's double catalyst: Apple partnership extended through 2031 and the OpenAI co-developed Jalapeño inference chip racks deploying late this year; PCIe/CXL switching and optical interconnect for pooled memory is home turf
cards.key_risk_en: AI revenue concentrated in a handful of hyperscalers; customers internalizing design capability is the long-term counter-risk

cards.moat_zh: HBM 堆叠使 DRAM 测试强度倍增，测试机是 T1 扩产的隐性受益人；2026年内股价已翻倍有余
cards.thesis_zh: 美光创纪录季度后 HBM 测试订单预期升温（Cantor 目标价550）；7月2日单日-13.6%的板块恐慌显示高贝塔属性，论点未变但波动加剧
cards.key_risk_zh: 无业绩支撑的估值扩张；内存资本开支若因供给过剩担忧收缩，订单弹性反噬
cards.moat_en: HBM stacking multiplies DRAM test intensity — testers are the quiet beneficiary of every T1 capacity add; stock up ~140% in 2026
cards.thesis_en: Micron's record quarter stoked HBM test-order expectations (Cantor target $550); the July 2 single-day -13.6% sector panic shows the high-beta profile — thesis intact, volatility elevated
cards.key_risk_en: Valuation ran ahead of bookings; if memory capex flinches on oversupply fear, order elasticity cuts both ways

catalysts.what: Q2 2026 earnings — confirmation HBM orders are building in backlog

cards.moat_zh: 内存接口芯片+IP 授权双引擎；新发布 SOCAMM2 芯片组把 LPDDR5X 引入 AI 服务器内存模组，卡位低功耗高带宽新形态
cards.thesis_zh: DDR5 9600 RDIMM 与 LPDDR 服务器模组家族使其在 DRAM 代际升级和 CXL 控制器两条线均有敞口；上周波动大（7/7 -6.3%、7/8 +3.5%）
cards.key_risk_zh: 多家估值模型提示高估约30%；接口芯片竞争（澜起等）与授权收入周期性
cards.moat_en: Memory interface chips plus IP licensing; the new SOCAMM2 chipset brings LPDDR5X into AI-server memory modules, staking out the low-power high-bandwidth form factor
cards.thesis_en: DDR5 9600 RDIMM chipsets and the LPDDR server-module family give exposure to both DRAM generation upgrades and CXL controllers; choppy prior week (-6.3% Jul 7, +3.5% Jul 8)
cards.key_risk_en: Multiple valuation models flag ~30% overvaluation; interface-chip competition (Montage et al.) and licensing cyclicality

postMemory.take_zh: SKHY 首日+13%完成内存主线的美股「登陆战」，但周内板块两度大幅回吐（MU/SNDK 周五各-7%）确认了新常态：基本面（HBM 交期20-26周、NAND 合约价3Q26再涨10-15%、月度销售额创纪录）与股价波动脱钩，获利了结与供给反转恐惧主导短线。十张论点卡三张因价格证据更新（MU/SKHY/SNDK），其余未变；无换股提议。
postMemory.take_en: SKHY's +13% debut completed the memory trade's US landing, but two sharp intra-week givebacks (MU and SNDK both -7% Friday) confirm the new regime: fundamentals (20-26 week HBM lead times, NAND contracts up another 10-15% into 3Q26, record monthly sales) are decoupling from price action as profit-taking and oversupply fear drive the tape. Three of ten cards updated on price evidence (MU/SKHY/SNDK), the rest unchanged; no swap proposals.
